title: dogsvilla dv-status envelope
description: Worker firehose for status updates, task results, blockers, and notes back to the orchestrator.

to.description: Recipient identifier. 'root-orchestrator', a domain orchestrator ('platform-orch', 'consumer-orch', 'growth-orch', 'intel-orch'), a worker name, or '*' for broadcast.

summary.description: Required on type:result. Format: 'PASS — <≤30-word sentence>' / 'FAIL — …' / 'SKIP — …'. Used by check_result and orchestrator ledger closes.

consent_basis.description: How consent was obtained. Use 'orchestrator-dispatch-only' for non-production tasks.
